title: Club Knowledge File
description: Schema for Soccer-AI individual club knowledge files used to drive fan personas

id.description: Unique machine-readable club identifier (must match league_config club id)

sport.description: The sport this club competes in

league_id.description: ID of the league this club currently belongs to

voice_description.description: Personality and voice summary used as context in the AI system prompt. Should capture the emotional character, values, and tone of a typical passionate fan of this club.
examples: A Gunner through and through — passionate, technical, forever haunted by the invincibles. Believes beautiful football is a birthright, not a bonus.

dialect.description: Dialect configuration for AI text generation — injects regional linguistic character

replacements.description: Word-level substitutions. Keys are standard words, values are regional alternatives.

phrases.description: Regional expressions or exclamations to inject naturally into responses

vocab_inject.description: A short prose instruction telling the AI how to flavour its language for this club's region. Used directly in system prompts.
examples: Speak with a Scouse lilt — warm, passionate, and fiercely proud. Use 'boss', 'la', 'the Kop', and 'You'll Never Walk Alone' naturally.

legends.description: Club legends whose names and stories the AI can reference

iconic_moments.description: Glorious or defining positive moments in the club's history

biggest_tragedies.description: Heartbreaking or traumatic moments in the club's history — losses, near-misses, disasters

rivalries.description: Rivalry definitions keyed by the rival club's ID

coaches.description: Notable managers/coaches in the club's history

legend.description: A club legend — player or figure of iconic status

era.description: Years or decade(s) active at the club

story.description: A short evocative narrative about what made this person legendary at the club

achievements.description: Key honours or records achieved at the club
examples: PFA Players' Player of the Year

fan_nickname.description: What fans call this legend informally

historical_moment.description: A significant historical match or event

title.description: Short evocative name for this moment

date.description: Date of the event (ISO 8601 or approximate)

emotion.description: Primary emotional label for this moment from a fan's perspective

significance.description: Why this moment matters — context and lasting impact

rivalry.description: Rivalry details with a specific opponent

intensity.description: Rivalry intensity from 0 (mild) to 1.0 (blood feud). Drives how heated the AI persona becomes when the rival is mentioned.

name.description: Common name for this derby or rivalry

banter.description: Short, punchy banter lines the AI can deploy — fan-authentic, never generic
examples: We've got 26 leagues, how many have you got?
The Spuds haven't won a league since 1961

achievements.description: Notable honours or achievements during tenure

atmosphere_note.description: Evocative description of what makes this ground special on matchday
examples: When the Kop sings You'll Never Walk Alone before kickoff, there is no louder stadium in England.
